name: academorix/serializer
purpose: Data serialization and transformation utilities — PHP-native serialize / unserialize + JSON encode / decode with error handling and Fractal API-transformer integration.
capabilities: PHP-native serialize / unserialize with class allowlist
JSON encode / decode with typed error reporting
Sensible defaults for API + config contexts
when_to_use: Serialising complex data to cache / session or building an API response payload with League/Fractal transformers.
when_not_to_use: For structured DTOs and response shaping, prefer spatie/laravel-data via academorix/crud instead.
